mapper.sql: id, event_id, name, price, total_stock, stock_remaining, seckill_start, seckill_end, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_types (id, event_id, name, price, total_stock, stock_remaining, seckill_start, seckill_end, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{eventId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{totalStock}, #{stockRemaining}, #{seckillStart}, #{seckillEnd}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ticket_types WHERE event_id = #{eventId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_types WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_types SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, total_stock = #{totalStock}, stock_remaining = #{stockRemaining}, seckill_start = #{seckillStart}, seckill_end = #{seckillEnd}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM ticket_types WHERE status = 'ONLINE'
